title: lonchophaca osterhoutii
intro: Lonchophaca osterhoutii is a perennial legume, a type of flowering plant in the pea family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as aiding in digestion and relieving menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
